settings.title: Twenty Years On, Backing the Next Mechanics
settings.excerpt: Two decades after we opened the doors, we are putting our anniversary into apprentices instead of a party.
settings.body:
Torque has been turning spanners on this road for twenty years this summer. The trade has changed beyond recognition, but the shortage of young mechanics has only got worse.

So we are marking the milestone by taking on two apprentices and sponsoring tool kits for the motor course at the local college.

Both of us who founded the garage started as apprentices ourselves, sweeping floors and watching closely. Someone gave us a chance, and this felt like the right way to pass it on.

Thank you to the customers who have trusted us with their cars for twenty years. Some of you we have now seen through three or four vehicles, and that means a great deal.
